headline: How Microchip’s New Industrial PoE and Edge AI Tools At Microchip Technology (MCHP) Has Changed Its Investment Story
summary: Earlier in July, Microchip Technology expanded its industrial and AI-focused portfolio by launching the PD-9601GCI industrial-grade Power over Ethernet midspan and releasing the VectorBlox 3.0 SDK to simplify FPGA-based AI deployment on its PolarFire platforms. These additions highlight Microchip’s push into rugged industrial automation and efficient edge AI, aiming to make complex connected systems easier to power, deploy and manage. We’ll now examine how Microchip’s new industrial PoE...
